name: Jade Skywalker
description: Jade skywalker is the last daughter of Anakin Skywalker and is the only child with him still. After Anakin became Darth Vader in the year 19 BBY, he took Jade along with him away from Pademe and her other siblings. During the years that Jade has been with Darth Vader and Sheev Palpatine she has been protected by the Galactic empire and has grown to be like her father but in most way as her mother. But she has sworn an oath to stay with her father and the empire along side Sheev Palpatine who she calls grandfather. (sorry if it's kinda iffy it's my first time doing this)
creator: jadedlovers
